visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man with short black hair, wearing glasses and a grey flat-patterned cap, stands in front of a neutral grey background. He is wearing a blue long-sleeved shirt and a wooden bead bracelet on his left wrist. He points his finger towards the camera and gestures expressively with his hands while speaking. Colorful graphic icons like a LINE logo with 'pirated' text and social media handles appear in the top corners. (2) The scene shifts to a screen capture overlay showing a Google search result page for 'LINE PC version download'. The man's face remains visible in the background but is dimmed. The search results highlight a suspicious URL. (3) The man returns to full prominence, gesturing with both hands open as if explaining a concept. A white search bar graphic with the text 'LINE computer version' pops up near his chest level. The lighting is bright and even, highlighting his facial features and the texture of his cap. (4) Close-up on the man as he continues to speak with high energy. Graphic overlays appear representing a computer screen with 'Trojan horse' text and an emoji with a worried expression indicating 'personal data leakage'. He uses his hands to emphasize the points. (5) The man points down towards a newly appeared graphic showing the official LINE logo and a specific URL 'https://www.line.me/'. A megaphone icon and a green checkmark are added to the frame. He finishes with a hand gesture of caution as the video concludes.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 3c有意思tim哥. [Logo]: @3ctim. [Logo]: miko. [Subtitle]: 你有想過. (2) [Variety]: 盜版. [Subtitle]: 你下載的LINE是盜版的嗎. (3) [Subtitle]: 近期有駭客假冒LINE下載網站. (4) [Subtitle]: 並透過Google搜尋關鍵字. (5) [Subtitle]: 誘導使用者點擊. [Slogan]: LINE電腦版. (6) [Subtitle]: 只要你Google搜尋. (7) [Subtitle]: LINE電腦版. (8) [Subtitle]: 就有可能呢. (9) [Subtitle]: 誤入了假的LINE網站. (10) [Subtitle]: 一旦安裝. (11) [Variety]: 木馬程式. [Subtitle]: 電腦可能中木馬、個資外洩. (12) [Variety]: 個資外洩. (13) [Subtitle]: 甚至於會被. (14) [Subtitle]: 被遠端操控. (15) [Variety]: 官方有提醒. [Subtitle]: 官方有提醒. (16) [Subtitle]: 下載網頁一定要認明. (17) [Slogan]: https://www.line.me/. [Subtitle]: 官方的網址. (18) [Subtitle]: 就在這裡 好. (19) [Subtitle]: 也不要. (20) [Subtitle]: 從不明的第三方網站來安裝. (21) [Subtitle]: 這樣才有效可以降低中毒的風險. (22) [Subtitle]: 要小心啊~.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator presenting to the camera.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man wearing glasses, a grey flat cap, a blue long-sleeved shirt, and a wooden bead bracelet on his left wrist.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, minimalist studio background with a plain grey wall and subtle interior lighting suggesting an office or home studio environment.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male voice begins speaking with a high-energy, engaging tone, posing a rhetorical question. The background features a steady, upbeat electronic pop track with a noticeable synth rhythm. (2) A digital 'pop' sound effect triggers as a visual graphic appears. The narrator's speech continues at a moderate-to-fast pace, describing cybersecurity risks in a clear, authoritative manner. (3) A synthesized chime or UI alert sound punctuates the mention of 'Google search', maintaining the instructional flow. The BGM remains consistent in volume and tempo. (4) As the risks of Trojans are mentioned, a cartoon-style warning sound effect is heard, briefly increasing the audio arousal level. The speaker's pitch rises slightly to emphasize the danger. (5) The narrator transitions to a helpful, advisory tone, listing the official URL clearly. The audio concludes with a friendly but cautious closing remark, while the BGM fades out sharply with a final percussive beat.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Problem -> Warning -> Solution -> Recommendation
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To alert users about the prevalence of fake LINE download sites appearing in search results and to provide the official download link to ensure user safety from malware and data theft.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator actively promotes the official LINE website as the only safe source for the application.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video effectively utilizes tech-vlog stylistic elements, combining a talking-head format with clear graphic overlays to deliver a concise security warning.
